name: Mei Lin
title: Quantitative Researcher
summary: Quant researcher at a top-5 HFT firm. Researches and implements statistical arbitrage strategies in equities and futures. Deep expertise in market microstructure and low-latency signal generation. Published in the Journal of Financial Economics.

highlights: Researched and deployed 3 live stat-arb strategies in US equities generating $12M+ annual PnL
Built backtesting framework in Python/C++ handling tick-level data for 5,000+ symbols
Reduced signal latency by 30% through order book feature engineering and C++ microoptimizations
Contributed to systematic futures strategies using alternative data sources
Published internal research on microstructure alpha decay across asset classes
